result.stdout:
Usage: [command] [-h|--help] [--version]

Commands:
  generate    Generate a class diagram from a solution and write it to a file.

commands.payload:
Usage: [command] [-h|--help] [--version]

Commands:
  generate    Generate a class diagram from a solution and write it to a file.

result.stdout:
Usage: generate [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Generate a class diagram from a solution and write it to a file.

Options:
  -s|--solution <string>        Solution to analyze and generate UML diagram for. (Required)
  -f|--format <OutputType>      Output type for the diagram. Options: markdown, image, html (Default: Markdown)
  -o|--output-file <string?>    Target location for UML file output. If a location is not provided, then a filename including a timestamp will be created in the current directory. (Default: @"diagramyyyyMMddHHmmss.md")

  -o|--output-file <string?>    Target location for UML file output. If a location is not provided, then a filename including a timestamp will be created in the current directory. (Default: @"diagramyyyyMMddHHmmss.md")
